description: Triggers for ATS compatibility analysis and keyword optimization

queries.query: Analyze my resume for ATS compatibility and fix keyword gaps
My resume keeps getting rejected by ATS systems — optimize it
Score my resume's keyword match for this job description
What keywords from this JD am I missing in my resume?
Optimize my resume to pass Workday and Greenhouse screening
Fix the ATS formatting issues in my resume
My resume has a two-column layout — will it pass ATS? Fix it if not
Check if my resume abbreviations will match the full-form keywords in ATS
Give me an ATS pass rate estimate and optimization plan for this resume
I'm using 'k8s' on my resume — should I spell out Kubernetes for ATS?
Help me write strong resume bullet points
Create a creative visual resume for my design portfolio
Write a tailored resume for this specific company
Quantify my resume achievements with better metrics
Build a professional summary section for my resume
Format my resume with consistent fonts and spacing
Write an executive resume for a VP Engineering role
Help me manage multiple versions of my resume
Create a cover letter for this job application
Optimize my LinkedIn profile for the same job I'm applying for
